diagrams.title: Conductor Pipeline
diagrams.description: Autonomous ticket-to-PR workflow — from GitHub issue through planning, implementation, review, and pull request creation.

nodes.label: /conductor start #N
nodes.tooltip: Developer triggers the conductor with a GitHub issue number. The conductor reads the issue, loads context, and begins the autonomous workflow.

nodes.label: plan-architect
nodes.tooltip: Reads the GitHub issue, analyzes the codebase, and generates a phased implementation plan with discrete tasks. Uses Opus for maximum reasoning depth.

nodes.label: task-executor
nodes.tooltip: Implements individual tasks from the plan. Expert skills are pre-loaded per task. Loops through all tasks in each phase.

nodes.label: phase-verifier
nodes.tooltip: Verifies each phase is complete and correct before advancing to the next. Runs quality checks at phase boundaries.

nodes.label: review-orchestrator
nodes.tooltip: Runs /preflight, /ui-test, and /a11y-audit quality gates. Produces review findings.

nodes.label: finding-resolver
nodes.tooltip: Creates atomic fix tasks from review findings and feeds them back to task-executor for remediation.

nodes.label: debug-investigator
nodes.tooltip: Deep 7-step investigation for tasks that fail 3 times. Uses Opus for maximum reasoning depth. Escalates to human via GitHub if still blocked.

nodes.label: pr-creator
nodes.tooltip: Creates the pull request with structured description, links to the GitHub issue, and moves the ticket on the kanban board.

diagrams.title: Data Flow
diagrams.description: How data moves between the browser, Next.js server, and Supabase — client state, server state, auth, and storage.

nodes.label: React Components
nodes.tooltip: UI layer rendering pages and interactive elements. Consumes server state via Tanstack Query and client state via Zustand.

nodes.label: Tanstack Query
nodes.tooltip: Manages server data with caching, background refetch, and optimistic updates. Uses custom fetch wrapper from src/libs/fetch.ts.

nodes.label: Zustand Store
nodes.tooltip: Local client state with createSelectors pattern. Stores: edit-wizard, create-wizard, context-store. Persisted to localStorage where needed.

nodes.label: API Routes
nodes.tooltip: 60+ RESTful API routes handling all server-side operations. Uses Supabase server client with cookie-based auth.

nodes.label: proxy.ts
nodes.tooltip: Next.js 16 middleware handling session refresh, auth redirects, and onboarding checks on every request.

nodes.label: Auth
nodes.tooltip: Supabase Auth with cookie-based sessions via @supabase/ssr. Handles signup, login, password reset, and email change.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.tooltip: Primary database with Row Level Security on all tables. Server client uses publishable key; admin client uses secret key for elevated operations.

nodes.label: Storage
nodes.tooltip: Two storage buckets: listing-images for product photos and thumbnails, profile-assets for member avatars and shop banners/hero images.

diagrams.title: Skill & Agent Pipeline
diagrams.description: Developer command routing through skills and agents — from slash commands through expert skills, design intelligence, conductor pipeline, and testing to outputs.

nodes.label: /feature-pipeline
nodes.tooltip: End-to-end feature development: design spec → ticket generation → conductor build. Orchestrates the full lifecycle.

nodes.label: /design-spec
nodes.tooltip: Generate a comprehensive design specification for a feature, including UX flows, data model, and API contracts.

nodes.label: /ticket-gen
nodes.tooltip: Generate GitHub issues from a design spec, organized by phase with acceptance criteria.

nodes.label: /conductor start #N
nodes.tooltip: Start the autonomous conductor pipeline for a specific GitHub issue.

nodes.label: /preflight
nodes.tooltip: Pre-merge quality gate: lint, typecheck, format, build, and test validation.

nodes.label: /audit
nodes.tooltip: Code quality audit across the codebase for patterns, consistency, and best practices.

nodes.label: /marketplace-audit
nodes.tooltip: Competitive analysis against real marketplace platforms (Etsy, Reverb, Poshmark) for feature parity.

nodes.label: /a11y-audit
nodes.tooltip: Accessibility audit using WCAG guidelines, checking semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard nav, and color contrast.

nodes.label: /ui-test
nodes.tooltip: Visual UI testing via browser automation — verifies component rendering and interaction behavior.

nodes.label: /feature-scaffold
nodes.tooltip: Scaffold a new feature directory with standard structure: components, hooks, services, types, constants.

nodes.label: /db-migrate
nodes.tooltip: Generate and apply Supabase database migrations with RLS policies and indexes.

nodes.label: /write-tests
nodes.tooltip: Generate Vitest unit and integration tests for existing code.

nodes.label: /debug
nodes.tooltip: Systematic debugging skill for investigating and resolving issues.

nodes.label: /ask-supabase
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing Supabase files. Provides context on RLS, auth patterns, storage, and database operations.

nodes.label: /ask-nextjs
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing App Router files. Provides context on routing, server components, and proxy.ts patterns.

nodes.label: /ask-vercel
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing Vercel config. Provides context on deployment, crons, and platform configuration.

nodes.label: /ask-scss
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing SCSS modules. Provides context on design tokens, theming, and styling patterns.

nodes.label: /ask-state
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing hooks or stores. Provides context on Tanstack Query, Zustand, and state management patterns.

nodes.label: ux-researcher
nodes.tooltip: Researches UX patterns from competitor marketplaces and generates design recommendations for Nessi features.

nodes.label: marketplace-audit
nodes.tooltip: Analyzes real marketplace platforms for feature parity, UX patterns, and competitive insights.

nodes.label: plan-architect
nodes.tooltip: Generates phased implementation plans from GitHub issues.

nodes.label: task-executor
nodes.tooltip: Implements individual tasks with pre-loaded expert skills.

nodes.label: phase-verifier
nodes.tooltip: Validates phase completion before advancing.

nodes.label: review-orchestrator
nodes.tooltip: Runs quality gates: preflight, ui-test, a11y-audit.

nodes.label: finding-resolver
nodes.tooltip: Creates atomic fix tasks from review findings.

nodes.label: debug-investigator
nodes.tooltip: Deep investigation for tasks failing 3+ times.

nodes.label: pr-creator
nodes.tooltip: Creates pull request with structured description.

nodes.label: ticket-generator
nodes.tooltip: Generates GitHub issues from design specs.

nodes.label: ui-tester
nodes.tooltip: Browser-based UI testing agent for visual verification and interaction testing.

nodes.label: browser-debug
nodes.tooltip: Browser automation agent for debugging rendering and interaction issues.

nodes.label: a11y-auditor
nodes.tooltip: Accessibility auditing agent checking WCAG compliance.

nodes.label: test-author
nodes.tooltip: Generates unit and integration tests for existing code.

nodes.label: Design Specs
nodes.tooltip: Markdown design specifications produced by /design-spec and ux-researcher.

nodes.label: GitHub Issues
nodes.tooltip: Structured GitHub issues with acceptance criteria, organized on the project kanban board.

nodes.label: Pull Request
nodes.tooltip: Final output of the conductor pipeline — a ready-to-review PR linked to the source issue.

diagrams.title: Tech Stack
diagrams.description: Technology layers powering the Nessi marketplace — frontend, state management, backend, infrastructure, and code quality.

nodes.label: Next.js 16
nodes.tooltip: Full-stack React framework with file-system routing, server components, and proxy.ts middleware.

nodes.label: React 19
nodes.tooltip: UI component library with hooks, server components, and concurrent features.

nodes.label: SCSS Modules
nodes.tooltip: Scoped CSS with Nessi design tokens, dark theme, and frosted glass effects.

nodes.label: react-icons
nodes.tooltip: Icon library providing HiOutline and other icon sets across the UI.

nodes.label: next/image
nodes.tooltip: Automatic image optimization with lazy loading and responsive sizing.

nodes.label: Tanstack Query
nodes.tooltip: Data fetching and caching with useQuery/useMutation. QueryCache handles 403 context revocation.

nodes.label: Zustand
nodes.tooltip: Lightweight stores with createSelectors pattern (useStore.use.*()). Used for edit wizards, create wizards, and context switching.

nodes.label: AuthProvider
nodes.tooltip: React context providing authenticated Supabase client and user session to the component tree.

nodes.label: Supabase Auth
nodes.tooltip: Authentication via @supabase/ssr with cookie-based session management. Supports email/password signup.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.tooltip: Relational database with Row Level Security on all tables. Managed by Supabase with migrations in supabase/migrations/.

nodes.label: Supabase Storage
nodes.tooltip: Object storage with two buckets: listing-images (product photos + thumbnails) and profile-assets (avatars, shop banners).

nodes.label: Vercel
nodes.tooltip: Hosting platform with automatic deployments from GitHub, edge CDN, and serverless functions.

nodes.label: GitHub Actions
nodes.tooltip: Continuous integration running format check, lint, typecheck, tests, and build on every push.

nodes.label: Vercel Analytics
nodes.tooltip: First-party web analytics integrated via @vercel/analytics in the root layout.

nodes.label: Speed Insights
nodes.tooltip: Real user performance monitoring via @vercel/speed-insights in the root layout.

nodes.label: ESLint
nodes.tooltip: Linting with Next.js core-web-vitals and TypeScript configs.

nodes.label: Prettier
nodes.tooltip: Code formatting with semi, singleQuote, trailingComma all configuration.

nodes.label: Stylelint
nodes.tooltip: SCSS linting with stylelint-config-standard-scss.

nodes.label: TypeScript
nodes.tooltip: Type safety with strict: true in tsconfig.json.

nodes.label: Vitest
nodes.tooltip: Unit and integration testing framework with setup file and workspace configuration.
